title: Chat Rules
subtitle: Keep our community awesome and respectful

rules.title: Be Respectful and Kind
rules.description: Treat everyone in chat with kindness and respect. No personal attacks, harassment, or bullying of any kind.

rules.title: No Hate Speech or Discrimination
rules.description: Absolutely no discrimination based on race, gender, religion, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic.

rules.title: Keep Chat PG-13
rules.description: Avoid excessive profanity, sexual content, and graphic language. Keep chat around a PG-13 level so everyone can enjoy it, regardless of the age rating of the game being played.

rules.title: No Spam or Self-Promotion
rules.description: Do not spam links, repeatedly post the same message, or excessively promote your own content without permission.

rules.title: Respect Streamer Authority
rules.description: Follow the streamer and moderator decisions. Do not argue with moderator actions in chat. Use whisper or mail for concerns.

rules.title: No Excessive Emote Spam
rules.description: Use emotes reasonably. Avoid flooding chat with repeated emote strings that obstruct conversation.

rules.title: Do Not Share Personal Information
rules.description: Never share your own or others personal information (addresses, phone numbers, real names without consent, etc).

rules.title: No Backseat Gaming
rules.description: Avoid giving unsolicited advice on how to play the game. Let the streamer enjoy their experience without constant commentary on their gameplay choices.

rules.title: No Spoilers Unless Asked For
rules.description: Do not post spoilers for games, shows, or other content unless the streamer has specifically asked for them.

consequences.title: Consequences for Violations
items: First offense: Warning from moderator and message deleted
Third offense or severe violation: Ban from chat
Severe harassment or hate speech: Immediate ban
